mapper.sql: c.id, c.name, c.description, c.price, c.instructor_id, c.created_at, c.updated_at, u.name AS instructor_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM courses c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.instructor_id = u.id
AND ( c.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{escapedKeyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\' OR COALESCE(c.description, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{escapedKeyword}, '%') ESCAPE '\' )
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT
FROM courses c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.instructor_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses ( name, description, price, instructor_id ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{instructorId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE courses SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, instructor_id = #{instructorId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM courses WHERE id = #{id})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM enrollments WHERE course_id = #{id})
